name: tju_relink_min
drl: rule RJ when $a : E1(tag == "z") $b : E0(this before[0ms,100ms] $a) then end
_finding: D-171 relink-SET family (mechanism CRACKED, fix VALIDATED in recon and REVERTED pending the Bryan gate — diff verbatim in docs/tjupd-ledger-mechanisms.md §4): an anchor's alpha-EXIT stages an s0-DEL that no eval consumes while the rule is unlinked (dels don't count as flush-touch; unlinked evals don't fold s0); at the RE-ENTRY the dstash hides the pre-existing del from the relink eval, so it drains at the NEXT FIRE after the fresh pairs derive and its value-keyed kill destroys the re-created children. Fix = the dstash exempts an s0-del whose fact re-enters in the same flush (del-then-ins in stage order, Drools' relink drain).
